heading: Donations of buildings and other property
label: 179 Donations of buildings and other property
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized, in his discretion, to accept buildings, moneys, or other property which may be useful in the betterment of the administration and affairs of the Glacier National Park under his supervision, and which may be donated for park purposes. He may accept patented lands or rights-of-way over patented lands in the Glacier National Park that may be donated for park purposes.
notes: CodificationThe first sentence of this section is from section 1 of act , and the last sentence from section 1 of act .June 12, 1917July 1, 1916
